title: Property Consultant - NCC Urban - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NCC Urban - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
